mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, name, gender, role_id, department_id, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{roleId}, #{departmentId}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, # password, name, gender, role_id, department_id, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, # password, name, gender, role_id, department_id, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_user ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT sys_user.id AS id, sys_user.username AS username, sys_user.password AS password, sys_user.name AS name, sys_user.gender AS gender, sys_user.role_id AS role_id, sys_role.name AS role_name, sys_user.department_id AS department_id, sys_user.status AS status, sys_user.create_time AS create_time, sys_user.update_time AS update_time FROM sys_user LEFT JOIN sys_role ON sys_user.role_id = sys_role.id WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_user
username = #{username},
password = #{password},
name = #{name},
gender = #{gender},
role_id = #{roleId},
department_id = #{departmentId},
status = #{status},
update_time = #{updateTime},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM sys_user WHERE id IN
#{id}
